title: Historical Parent-Root Publication And Host Mirror Sync Gate
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 parent-root publication and host-mirror synchronization slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-010` parent-root publication and host-mirror synchronization slice
objective: Execute the bounded repo-parity follow-through authorized by Packet 009 by publishing the approved Phase 5 authority set through the parent git root at `C:/APEX Platform` and synchronizing `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting GitHub-canonical commit without opening migration, mutating the preserved old clone, or widening scope into services, hosting, or AI-expansion work.
active_role: Olares Parent-Root Publication And Host Mirror Sync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 009 closes the planning pass and makes the repo-parity gate explicit. This packet exists to execute that bounded follow-through: publish the approved Phase 5 authority set through the workstation parent-root boundary first, then synchronize only the prepared host parent-root mirror at `/home/olares/code/apex`.
required_inputs: The Packet 009 classification of current Phase 5 artifacts into commit/publish, defer, and comparison-only buckets
The workstation parent-root repository state at `C:/APEX Platform`
The prepared host parent-root mirror at `/home/olares/code/apex`
The preserved old host clone at `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` as historical runtime evidence only
The GitHub-canonical repository `https://github.com/jasonlswenson-sys/RESA-Power-Project-Management.git` and the current publication branch policy for this lane
constrained_outputs: A dated execution handoff recording the bounded parent-root publication scope, exact published commit, and post-sync host-mirror evidence
A recorded preflight and postflight comparison of workstation and `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, and cleanliness state
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform` and confirm the proposed commit scope matches the Packet 009 minimum publication set.
Exclude unrelated parent-root changes, secrets, runtime artifacts, host-only state, service configuration changes, and implementation scaffolding deferred by Packet 009.
Create and publish the bounded parent-root commit to the GitHub-canonical repository, recording branch, remote, included paths, and resulting commit hash.
Capture pre-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, and cleanliness evidence without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.

Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using a non-destructive fast-forward-only method, and stop if the sync would require force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, or old-clone mutation.
Capture post-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, cleanliness, and authority-artifact presence evidence, including the Packet 009 handoff and current routing and roadmap state.
State whether the repo-parity gate is now satisfied strongly enough to justify a later separate workstation-migration readiness reassessment, while keeping migration itself not approved.

Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, auth or ingress changes, service changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting change, or any mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes bounded git publication and host-mirror synchronization only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Not yet executed. This packet exists because Packet 009 concluded that the remaining blocker is no longer gate definition; it is the bounded publication and synchronization follow-through needed to satisfy repo parity explicitly.
next_action: Execute this packet only within the bounded publication and synchronization scope defined here and only if workstation-migration readiness remains under consideration as a later separate reassessment lane.
